# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

cluster.name: production-search-cluster
node.name: ${HOSTNAME}

network.host: 0.0.0.0
http.port: 9200
transport.port: 9300

http.cors.enabled: true
http.cors.allow-origin: "*" # CONSIDERATION: In a production environment, it is highly recommended to replace "*" with a comma-separated list of specific origins (e.g., "https://your-webapp.com, https://another-app.com") for enhanced security.

# Cluster discovery settings
# Replace with the actual IP addresses or hostnames of your master-eligible nodes
discovery.seed_hosts: ["192.168.1.10", "192.168.1.11", "192.168.1.12"]

# For initial cluster bootstrapping, list the node names of the master-eligible nodes
# that should form the cluster. This should only be set on a fresh cluster.
# Once the cluster is formed, this setting is ignored.
# For existing clusters, remove or comment out this line after the cluster has successfully formed.
cluster.initial_master_nodes: ["master-node-1", "master-node-2", "master-node-3"]

# IMPORTANT PRODUCTION CONSIDERATIONS:
# 1. Memory Lock: Uncomment `bootstrap.memory_lock: true` to prevent the OS from swapping Elasticsearch memory to disk.
# bootstrap.memory_lock: true
# 2. Heap Size: Configure JVM heap size appropriately in jvm.options. Typically 50% of available RAM, not exceeding 32GB.
# 3. Dedicated Master Nodes: For large production clusters, consider having dedicated master nodes (node.master: true, node.data: false, node.ingest: false, node.ml: false).
# 4. Security: Implement X-Pack Security for authentication, authorization, and TLS encryption for HTTP and Transport layers.
# 5. Monitoring: Set up monitoring for your cluster.
# 6. Disk Type: Use fast SSDs for optimal performance.
